voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Che mưa. Bán sự an toàn cho người sợ Rửa. Linh chưa từng xài dịch vụ này. Quá đắt. Và — nếu mưa muốn tới, mưa tới. Che được bao lâu?
voice_adherence.fix: This explanatory aside reads as authorial intrusion, breaking the immersive sensory mode the voice establishes. Cut or fold into action: show a customer leaving with a receipt, show the price list, let Linh react to a detail rather than explain the business model.
voice_adherence.note: The chapter captures the voice well overall—body-before-emotion is present (tay vuốt mép yên, mùi ngấm vào quần áo), the vocabulary wells are active (nước, mưa, bùn, rong rêu), and the tone is buồn thăm thẳm without bi lụy. The dạ lan scent tracking is exactly the kind of physical-to-emotional chain the voice demands. Only stumbles are explanatory moments like the one quoted.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Linh đưa chìa khóa tra vào ổ. Tiếng lách cách. Cửa mở. (opening - this is actually Ch6 ending reused?) No — the ride to Hương Thủy. The departure beat is compressed: 'Từ đêm qua, sau khi Linh kể chuyện cái bóng trong gương, Bách chỉ nói: Đi. Ngay mai đi. Rồi quay lưng.'
beat_coverage.fix: This is a crucial beat compressed into summary. Show the moment — even three lines of scene: Bách's face when Linh tells about the shadow, the silence, the single command. The reader earned that confrontation.
beat_coverage.note: All five outline beats are hit and mostly dramatized. The Bà Lụa conversation is the strongest section — three full beats of question-evasion-revelation playing out in real time. The scent discovery at the end is well-seeded. The departure scene being summarized rather than shown is the gap.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Bách cười. Tiếng cười khô. 'Chưa hại. Chưa nói là không hại.'
character_voice.fix: This is functional but generic — any suspicious character could say this. Give Bách a specific physical tell or a Huế-tinged phrase that only she would use. Per her registry, she speaks 'ngắn, gọn, gay gắt' like hitting with a hammer. This line could cut deeper.
character_voice.note: Voices are differentiated: Bà Lụa's measured Huế cadence with 'Chi?' and deliberate pauses vs. Bách's blunted directness vs. Linh's hesitant observation. Bà Lụa's 'Tôi không biết ai' after the long silence is a genuine human moment — the lie told through timing, not words. Linh's internal voice stays sensory, not analytical.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: 'Ở đây, gần. Mùi đó. Ngửi hoài.' Bà Lụa's reaction to Linh mentioning the scent — 'mắt bà rộng hơn — ngạc nhiên? Hay sợ?' — is slightly over-explicit as a signpost.
plants_seeded.fix: Reduce Linh's interpretation. Just show Bà Lụa's physical reaction (the hand stopping, the pause) and let the reader register the significance. The question 'ngạc nhiên? Hay sợ?' does the reader's work for them.
plants_seeded.note: The dạ lan scent thread is beautifully reinforced — from urban rarity to Hương Thủy constant presence, the geography of smell doing investigative work. Bà Lụa's evasions plant the Cảnh connection without naming him. The empty chair callback at Bà Tâm's is natural. The 'thợ nước' file from Ch6 is implicitly connected through location. All plants are invisible enough.

prose_quality.fix: Replace with action or silence: 'Bà Lụa nâng chén lên. Thổi. Uống.' — the scene already shows the conversation is over. The summary statement adds nothing.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Ở thành phố, mùi này báo hiệu mưa đến. Ở đây, mùi này không đi đâu cả. Mùi này sống ở đây. Người tạo ra mùi này sống ở đây.
prose_quality.note: Strong rhythm control: the fragmented observation sentences (Tóc. Tóc. Tóc.), the long sensory chains (mùi nhang trầm xen mùi chè xanh sao và vải cũ), the breath-short exchanges with Bà Lụa. The 'nói dối' passages where Linh reads body language are excellent voice work. Issue: several paragraphs begin with subject-verb (Linh + verb, Bách + verb) in sequence, creating a subtle monotony.

continuity.note: Emotional state tracks perfectly from Ch6's mirror horror. The shadow incident is referenced as catalyst without re-exposition. Linh's determination to investigate connects to her Ch5 decision to cooperate with Bách. The empty chair continues its haunt from Ch3. Physical details (Linh's rough hands, Bách's current female body implied through 'lưng áo') remain consistent. Only gap: the departure scene is summarized rather than shown, creating a slight jump-cut feeling.

canon_compliance.note: All facts check against canon: Bà Lụa's 1978 Rửa, her prediction ability (tay ngứa, six hours), her record-keeping, Hương Thủy's geography (vùng trũng, ngập nước, nhà cọc), the dạ lan + trầm scent signature, Bà Tâm's silent care, the empty chair ritual. Bà Lụa's claim about seeing someone by the river in 1978 is a new detail but doesn't contradict established lore — it enriches it. No violations found.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: Nhà Bà Lụa. Căn nhà gỗ lớn hơn những căn quanh đó, cọc cao hơn, sơn son đã bong tróc nhiều nơi. Bậc thềm ngập nửa. Cửa mở. Bên trong tối.
lore_integration.fix: This description is adequate but could be more specific to the Rửa economy — a detail showing how the che chắn business shapes the architecture itself (extra bạt rolled on the roof, sealant on door frames, a shed of supplies). Make the world's wound visible in the house.
lore_integration.note: The che chắn service does work — it's not set dressing, it's a character's livelihood built on the world's central fear. Hương Thủy's geography isn't backdrop; the flooding, the cọc houses, the tre roots like veins — this is terrain shaped by and shaping the Rửa phenomenon. The scent geography (stronger here = caller is here) is excellent world-as-detection.

engagement.weakest_moment: The return journey (from 'Xe chạy ra trục đường lớn' to 'Cô sẽ quay lại') loses momentum — several paragraphs of Linh restating what she already knows without new information or emotional shift.
engagement.fix: Cut or compress the return-trip rumination. End the chapter closer to the emotional peak — perhaps at Bà Tâm's, with the empty chair, the realization about loss versus understanding condensed. The final three paragraphs before 'Linh chờ mưa' are especially redundant.
engagement.note: The Bà Lụa conversation is the chapter's engine — three rounds of question-and-evade, each with escalating stakes. The scent revelation ('Mùi này sống ở đây') is the genuine surprise moment. The empty chair callback lands well. The tension comes from mystery (who calls the rain?) and proximity (they're close) rather than action. That's appropriate for this beat, but the return journey cools the heat too much.

three_weakest_sentences: Thế vẫn phải tìm. Vì không tìm thì không biết mình đã mất cái gì. Mà không biết thì không buông được.
three_strongest_sentences: Ở thành phố, mùi này báo hiệu mưa đến. Ở đây, mùi này không đi đâu cả. Mùi này sống ở đây. Người tạo ra mùi này sống ở đây.

Nói dối. Linh biết ngay. Không phải vì giọng bà thay đổi — giọng bà vẫn đều, vẫn chậm, vẫn bình thản. Nhưng tay bà. Tay bà di chuyển, vuốt mép áo lần thứ hai trong một phút. Người bình tĩnh không vuốt áo hai lần.
Nước sánh, nổi váng rong rêu, bao quanh chân cọc nhà hai bên đường. Cọc ngập đến giữa. Mấy căn nhà gỗ nghiêng, tựa như người già chống gậy trong đại dãi.
ai_patterns_detected: Several consecutive paragraphs begin with character names (Linh/Bách) in subject-verb pattern, creating subtle structural monotony
The return journey contains restatement of already-established information without new emotional or plot value — a padding pattern
Minor: explanatory aside about che chắn service reads as authorial intrusion into POV
top_3_revisions: Replace 'Cuộc gặp kết' with pure action: Bà Lụa lifts her cup, blows, drinks. The reader knows the meeting is over. No summary needed.

Cut or compress the return-journey paragraphs (from 'Xe chạy ra trục đường lớn' through 'Cô sẽ quay lại Hương Thủy / Sẽ tìm / Sẽ hỏi cho ra') — the reader already knows this. End the chapter at the empty chair moment or at 'Linh chờ mưa'.

Dramatize the departure decision in one beat of scene: Bách's face when Linh mentions the shadow, the silence, the two-word command. Currently summarized as backstory; showing it would give emotional stakes to the trip.
new_canon_entries: Bà Lụa承认见过有人在深夜坐在河边，水没过脚，云层聚集（但她隐瞒了那人身份）
Bà Lụa说她1978年第一次被Rửa时也见过类似现象——有人坐在河边
Dạ lan pha trầm的香味在Hương Thủy常年存在，比城里更浓更持久
Bà Lụa对Linh提起dạ lan香味时表现异常——手停止动作，眼神变化
Linh和Bách正式开始合作调查谁在叫雨
